title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue is visible on the Home Screen
scenario: Location sharing dialog appears on Home Screen after first-time app launch and license acceptance
steps: Launch the app for the first time.
expected: A location sharing dialogue is displayed on the Home Screen with the headline "Allow 'Poly Lens' to use your location?" and options 'Allow Once', 'Allow While Using App', and 'Don't Allow'. It also includes the text: "Poly Lens uses your location to find your device. See the Poly Privacy Policy in General Settings for more information."
